CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the national performance database. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. The applicant's zip code at the time of application. Enter first to auto-fill Applicant City, State and County. Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The applicant's zip code at the time of application. Enter first to auto-fill Applicant City, State and County.
Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.label: Applicant Zip Code
